title: rubus longiglandulosus var. ferox
intro: Rubus longiglandulosus var. ferox, commonly known as the thorny raspberry or ferox bramble, is a thorny shrub native to New Zealand. It is a variant of the Rubus longiglandulosus plant, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, skin conditions, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Rubus longiglandulosus var. ferox can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
